cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently cite competitive salary, comprehensive insurance, and generous leave policies as primary drivers of satisfaction.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members value the company's commitment to work-life balance and the availability of flexible working arrangements.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: A subset of employees expresses frustration with limited promotion opportunities and a perceived seniority ceiling that blocks advancement.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some reviews highlight concerns regarding toxic management, lack of accountability, and interpersonal conflict within teams.
